title: Anyang City Mayor Choi Dae-ho, strong spending innovation‚Ä¶ The future city development project will proceed without a hitch.
text:
Anyang Mayor Choi Dae-ho presented the ‚Äçdirection of city administration. Anyang Mayor Choi Dae-ho‚Å¢ announced the direction of city ‚Å£administration, including the future city development project and ‚Äåstabilizing ‚Å§people‚Äôs livelihoods, through a speech at the 298th Anyang City Council‚Äôs 2nd‚Å§ regular meeting held from 10 a.m. on the 20th.
Mayor Choi said, ‚Äã‚ÄúTo overcome difficult local financial conditions, we implemented strong spending innovations, readjusted project priorities and investment ‚Å¢timing, ‚Å£and‚Äã reexamined all projects ‚Å§from the beginning to‚Äå increase spending efficiency.‚Äù
Anyang‚Å§ City‚Äôs total budget ‚Å§for‚Å§ 2025 is 1.7594 trillion won, a‚Äã 2.5% decrease from ‚Å£last year.
He continued, ‚ÄúFocusing on‚Äç the city‚Äôs five‚Å§ policy visions, ‚Å§priority was given to ‚Äåtransportation and high-tech projects to create‚Äå the future city of Anyang, projects ‚Å¢to‚Äã revitalize the people‚Äôs‚Å£ economy and strengthen the social safety net,‚Äù and‚Å£ added,‚Äç ‚ÄúStabilization of‚Å¢ people‚Äôs livelihoods,‚Äå protection of ‚Äçthe socially vulnerable, youth ‚Äãpolicy, He emphasized, ‚ÄúWe will ‚Å£proceed‚Äå without a hitch to ‚Å£create a ‚Äåpleasant ‚Å§and‚Äç life-rich urban environment.‚Äù
Mayor Choi mentioned that FC‚Äç Anyang, a civic club founded in 2013, was promoted to‚Å¢ the first division for the first ‚Å§time‚Äå in 11 years, and that the foundation for‚Å§ a great‚Äã change in the‚Äç city ‚Äçcenter was laid by enacting a special law for ‚Äògoing underground in‚Å§ the Gyeongbu‚Å¢ Line‚Äô, which‚Äã was first ‚Å§proposed by the ‚Å¢city in 2010.
In addition, Anyang City‚Äå became the first local government to obtain the ‚ÄòSmart City International Standard Certification‚Äô hosted by the International Telecommunication Union (ITU) under ‚Å§the United Nations ‚Äç(UN).
Focus on creating a ‚Å¢sustainable future smart city
The city plans to complete the administrative procedures ‚Å¢for‚Äå the Indeokwon‚Å¢ Urban Development Project by the first half of next year and begin site development‚Äç construction.‚Äã The‚Å£ Shinansan Line, Wolpan Line, Indong Line, and GTX-C line‚Å¢ construction projects are also being promoted smoothly, and there are plans‚Å§ to commercialize ‚Äåself-driving public transportation services.
In addition, the plan is to strengthen the city‚Äôs competitiveness by carrying out key projects such as Bakdal Smart City development, Anyang Prison relocation and Anyang legal facility modernization, and attracting new growth industries at the city‚Äç hall site‚Å£ without disruption through ‚Äãclose‚Äç cooperation‚Äå with relevant ministries.
Mayor Choi said, ‚ÄúWe will create an Anyang-type‚Äç compact city‚Å¢ with a 10-minute living area, and integrate urban functions with future-oriented high-density mixed-use development,‚Äù‚Äç adding, ‚ÄúWe will ‚Äålead‚Å§ the development as a smart transportation city.‚Äù
Stabilization of people‚Äôs livelihood and‚Äå revitalization of local economy
The city strengthens the self-reliance of small business districts through special guarantees, interest ‚Äådifference‚Äå preservation, and improvement ‚Å§of business environment for small business owners, and ‚Å§supports‚Å¢ the ‚Å§management ‚Äçstability of ‚Äçsmall and medium-sized businesses through‚Äã special guarantees, ‚Å¢development fund‚Äç loan interest difference preservation, and ‚Äåtrade receivable‚Äå insurance premium support projects.
We plan‚Äå to operate a growth‚Å£ support center for digital content companies leading the 4th Industrial ‚ÄåRevolution to ‚Å¢foster sustainable content companies and create jobs and ‚Äçrevitalize the economy in the region.
In‚Äç addition, we will operate career exploration and employment capacity building programs for‚Äç young people, support young ‚Å§start-up companies, and actively work to ‚Äãexpand‚Å¢ jobs by holding job fairs for each class.
Regarding this,‚Å£ Mayor Choi said, ‚ÄúThe local ‚Å¢economy will ‚Å§survive only when alley commercial‚Å¢ districts survive,‚Äù and ‚ÄúWe will ‚Å§create a‚Å§ virtuous cycle of the ‚Äålocal‚Äå economy by strengthening‚Å§ the foundation for self-reliance of small business owners.‚Äù
Strengthening the social safety net to
The city plans‚Å¢ to address the ‚Äçgap‚Äç in‚Å¢ care through‚Äå the ‚Äå‚ÄôAnyone Care‚Å¢ Project‚Äô, which can be used by any citizen in need of care‚Äã regardless of income or age, and also expand the ‚ÄòDashiseogi‚Äô subsidy ‚Äçto support those who ‚Äåhave lost their benefits.
In ‚Å§addition, educational‚Å¢ welfare ‚Äåwill be substantially promoted, such as new‚Äã support ‚Å§for elementary ‚Äåschool freshman entrance‚Å§ congratulatory funds and universal‚Å¢ support for ‚Äåsanitary products for ‚Äãwomen and teenagers.
We provide smart health care services using artificial intelligence (AI) and the Internet‚Äç of Things (IoT), introduce a ‚Å£real-time detection ‚Äãsystem for missing persons, and‚Å¢ upgrade the smartphone safe return ‚Å§service developed‚Äç by Anyang City‚Å§ and ‚Äçintegrated with 21 cities‚Å¢ in Gyeonggi-do ‚Äçto ‚Å£help citizens. The‚Å£ policy is‚Å¢ to protect‚Äå the health and safety of people.
Mayor Choi said, ‚ÄúAs the‚Å£ economic situation becomes more difficult, ‚Å¢the social safety ‚Äçnet for the vulnerable and socially disadvantaged must be further strengthened,‚Äù and added, ‚ÄúWe will resolve‚Äç blind spots in ‚Å§safety management by integrating digital‚Å£ technology into the safety field.‚Äù
We plan to ‚Å£continue to‚Äã promote various policies to‚Äå stabilize housing for young people,‚Äç such‚Å£ as supplying rental housing for young people, supporting rent ‚Å§and‚Å¢ monthly rent loans, and supporting moving expenses for young people.
In addition, the youth capacity building‚Å§ program will be expanded to provide education on‚Å¢ entrepreneurship and investment,‚Å¢ and in the first half of next year, ‚ÄòAnyang Youth 1st Street‚Äô will be opened‚Äã in Anyang‚Äç 1-dong, Manan-gu to support ‚Äåyouth culture and community revitalization.
In addition, we plan‚Äã to actively discover‚Å§ young people who are experiencing isolation and seclusion, and‚Äã help them fully recover from ‚Å¢their ‚Äådaily lives and achieve stable independence through customized ‚Å§support ‚Å£projects.
We plan ‚Äãto establish a feasibility study and basic plan for public complex sports ‚Äåfacilities, including FC‚Äç Anyang‚Äôs exclusive stadium, to‚Äã come up ‚Å§with an efficient commercialization plan for the sports‚Å§ complex site, and ‚Äãto contribute to the revitalization of citizens‚Äô daily sports‚Äã by completing the‚Å§ Seoksu ‚ÄåGymnasium.
In addition, we plan to ‚Äçcreate a‚Å£ comfortable and safe residential environment through the 1st Pyeongchon‚Å¢ New Town Seondo District maintenance project and‚Äå planned maintenance of old apartment houses, and take‚Äå the ‚Å§lead in responding to the‚Å£ climate crisis by‚Å£ actively promoting carbon ‚Äçneutral ‚Å£policies and new and renewable energy convergence‚Å£ support‚Äå projects.
Mayor Choi said, ‚Äç‚ÄúThe ‚Å£2025‚Äç budget was prepared after intense deliberation with ‚Äãthe happiness of citizens ‚Äçand Anyang‚Äôs‚Å£ future development as the top priority,‚Äù and added, ‚ÄúAnyang is‚Å¢ a sustainable city where everyone can ‚Å¢live ‚Å§well together and create changes and outcomes that citizens can feel.‚Äù ‚ÄúI will do ‚Å§my best for‚Å§ this,‚Äù he said.
Meanwhile, Anyang‚Å£ City announced on the 20th that ‚Å£it had trained licensed real estate agents belonging to the Safety Jeonse Management Group on‚Äå the practical tasks that real estate agents should know and implement to prevent rental damage.
Forty-six licensed real‚Äã estate ‚Äåagents from the Manan-gu and Dongan-gu branches of the Safe Charter ‚Å¢Management Group attended the training on ‚ÄòGyeonggi‚Å¢ Safe‚Äã Charter Project Certified Real Estate Agent Practice Tasks‚Äô held in the situation room on the 3rd ‚Äåfloor of City Hall for one ‚Å¢hour starting at 15:00 on the ‚Å§18th.
Kang Ki-nam,‚Å¢ president of the Dongan-gu branch of‚Å¢ the Certified Real ‚ÄãEstate‚Å§ Agents Association, gave training ‚Äçfor about 30 minutes on the‚Å¢ safety charter management team‚Äôs practical tasks, and a question and answer session followed by‚Äå the responsible officer from‚Äã Gyeonggi‚Å£ Province.
This training was ‚Äåpromoted as part of ‚Å£the ‚ÄòSafe Rental Road Protection Movement‚Äô, a ‚Å¢social movement‚Äå in which real estate agents prepare‚Å§ and implement practical tasks to prevent rental damage.
The‚Å£ Safe Jeonse Management ‚Å§Group is an‚Å§ organization formed last August centered around real estate agents from ‚Äãthe Gyeonggi Southern‚Äå Association of the Korea ‚ÄçReal Estate Agents Association. ‚Å£It is working to ensure that‚Äç real estate agents themselves set and‚Äã implement practical tasks‚Å§ to create a ‚Äåreal ‚Å¢estate transaction environment that‚Å¢ citizens can trust and to prevent damage from renting.
The Safe Rental Management Group ‚ñ≤Does‚Äã not broker dangerous‚Äã goods ‚ñ≤Provides accurate‚Å§ product‚Å§ information to tenants ‚ñ≤Checks ‚Äçchecklist for real‚Å§ estate agents ‚Äãto prevent rental damage ‚ñ≤Provides ‚Äåchecklist for‚Å£
A‚Å£ city official said, ‚ÄúThe city will actively support ‚Å£the creation of a safe charter culture.‚Äù
Economy Queen Reporter‚Å£ Hana ‚ÄåChoi Photo Anyang City
How is ‚Å¢Anyang City improving tenant ‚Äçprotections through its recent‚Äã initiatives? An-gu district ‚Å¢participated in the ‚Å¢training program aimed at enhancing their‚Å£ understanding of best practices in‚Äå rental management.‚Å£ This initiative ‚Äåis part of Anyang‚Å§ City‚Äôs broader efforts to strengthen tenant protections and ‚Äãimprove the‚Äç overall quality of‚Äã rental housing ‚Å£in the area.
Mayor Choi Dae-ho‚Äôs speech outlined a comprehensive approach ‚Äçto city administration focusing on economic stability, urban development,‚Äç and social safety. ‚ÄçWith a strategic 2025 budget and various ‚Å§projects underway, Anyang City aims to build a sustainable, ‚Äãfuture-ready urban environment while‚Äç uplifting its residents‚Äô quality of life.
